name: punchwall-visual-polish-smoke
description: Validate Hero City visual polish: bright anime hero lighting, city decor, smashable building facade textures, and responsive HUD sizing.

args.code:
local HttpService = game:GetService("HttpService")
local root = workspace:WaitForChild("PunchWallRPG", 10)
local polish = root:WaitForChild("Polish", 10)
local city = polish:WaitForChild("City Decor", 10)
local tier = polish:WaitForChild("Wall Tier Frames", 10)
local guide = polish:WaitForChild("Guide Path", 10)
local vfx = polish:WaitForChild("VFX Anchors", 10)
local detailCount = 0
local facadeCount = 0
for _, inst in ipairs(root:GetDescendants()) do
 if inst:GetAttribute("TextureStyle") == "ThreeDimensionalFacadeDetail" then detailCount += 1 end
 if inst.Name == "WindowFacade" then facadeCount += 1 end
end
return HttpService:JSONEncode({ hasGuide = guide ~= nil, hasTier = tier ~= nil, hasCity = city ~= nil, hasVfx = vfx ~= nil, cityChildren = #city:GetChildren(), tierChildren = #tier:GetChildren(), detailBucket = detailCount >= 1000 and "1000+" or tostring(detailCount), facadeBucket = facadeCount >= 20 and "20+" or tostring(facadeCount) })

steps.label: kaiju polish folders and 3d facade detail counts
wall has kaiju building facade and vfx
titan boss tower has city facade

args.code:
local HttpService = game:GetService("HttpService")
local player = game:GetService("Players").LocalPlayer
local gui = player:WaitForChild("PlayerGui"):WaitForChild("PunchWallHUD", 5)
local mobile = gui:WaitForChild("MobileControls", 5)
mobile.Visible = true
local punch = mobile:WaitForChild("ActionPunch", 5)
return HttpService:JSONEncode({ title = gui:FindFirstChild("StatsPanel", true):FindFirstChild("Title", true).Text, rewardPops = gui:FindFirstChild("RewardPops") ~= nil, mobileWidth = mobile.AbsoluteSize.X, punchWidth = punch.AbsoluteSize.X, punchText = punch.Text })
